title: Create Xcode project structure for macOS app - scaffold PRDesk.xcodeproj with macOS App template, Swift language, SwiftUI lifecycle
Set up basic SwiftUI app entry point - create App struct conforming to App protocol with a basic WindowGroup showing a placeholder 'PR Desk' text
Verify app builds and launches - run xcodebuild to confirm clean build, test launch shows window with placeholder text

USER ACTION REQUIRED: Install Xcode from Mac App Store or run 'sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app' if Xcode is already installed. Verify with 'xcodebuild -version'. This is required to build the native macOS app.

Build and launch the PRDesk macOS app to verify the project is correctly configured. Use 'xcodebuild -project PRDesk.xcodeproj -scheme PRDesk -configuration Debug build' to build. If successful, verify the app bundle is created. Acceptance: build succeeds without errors and app bundle exists.
Implement gh CLI wrapper to fetch user's authored PRs
description: Create Swift wrapper around 'gh pr list --author @me --json' to fetch PRs authored by the user. Parse JSON response into Swift model. Include acceptance: successfully fetches and parses PR list or returns empty array.

title: Implement gh CLI wrapper to fetch PRs where user is review-requested
description: Create Swift wrapper around 'gh pr list --search review-requested:@me --json' to fetch PRs where user is tagged for review. Parse JSON response into Swift model. Include acceptance: successfully fetches and parses tagged PR list or returns empty array.

title: Create PR data model and local storage
description: Define Swift struct/class for PR data (title, number, repo, author, reviewers, comments, status, lastActivity). Implement simple in-memory storage or file-based persistence. Include acceptance: model can be created from gh JSON response and persisted/retrieved.

title: Create basic data refresh mechanism
description: Implement manual refresh function that calls both gh wrappers and updates local storage. Wire to app launch. Include acceptance: app fetches PR data on launch and stores it locally. Verify with test GitHub account or mock data.

title: Replace ContentView placeholder with real PR list from PRDataStore
description: Load myPRs from PRDataStore.loadMyPRs() and display as a SwiftUI List in ContentView. Show compact info: PR title, repo name, updatedAt (relative time). Handle empty state gracefully. Update ContentView to use real data instead of placeholder text. Build succeeds and UI renders the PR list.

title: Add highlight state for PRs needing action vs waiting
description: Implement highlight rules for 'My PRs': PRs with new reviewer comments should be highlighted (bright), PRs waiting for reviewers should be dimmed. For now, use simple heuristic based on PR state (draft vs open). Add visual styling: bright white text for action-needed PRs, dimmed opacity for waiting PRs. Apply to PR list items. Build succeeds and visual states are distinguishable.

title: Save and restore floating panel position across app restarts
description: Observe FloatingPanel frame changes and save position to UserDefaults. On app launch, restore saved position if available, otherwise use default. Handle edge cases: invalid positions, off-screen positions. Build succeeds and position persists across app restarts (verify manually).

title: Create second FloatingPanel instance for 'PRs I'm Tagged In' widget
description: Create second FloatingPanelController in PRDeskApp. Position it offset from 'My PRs' widget (avoid overlap). Verify both widgets display simultaneously. Build succeeds and both widgets are visible on screen. Use TDD: write test harness first, then implement.

title: Display review-requested PRs in second widget with highlight logic
description: Create ContentView variant or add mode parameter to display reviewRequestedPRs from PRDataStore. Show PR list with same compact layout (title, repo, time). Apply same highlight logic (bright for action-needed, dimmed otherwise). Build succeeds and second widget shows real data. Use TDD: test harness verifies data loading and display.

title: Persist position for second widget independently
description: Add separate UserDefaults key for second widget position. Use same position persistence mechanism as first widget. Verify both widgets save/restore positions independently. Build succeeds and positions persist across restarts. Use TDD: test harness verifies independent position persistence for both widgets.

title: Create main detail window with tabs/sections for My PRs and PRs I'm Tagged In
description: Create DetailWindow.swift with NSWindow-based window controller. Use standard macOS window (not NSPanel). Include TabView or segmented control for 'My PRs' and 'PRs I'm Tagged In' sections. Wire to AppDelegate for window management. Build succeeds and window can be shown programmatically. Use TDD: test harness verifies window creation and tab switching.

title: Display detailed PR rows with title, number, repo, status, activity, usernames
description: Create DetailRowView component for detailed PR information. Display: PR title, PR number, repository, status, last activity time. Add usernames for reviewers and commenters (use placeholder fields for now since gh CLI doesn't provide this). Use List for PR rows with same data from PRDataStore. Apply same highlight logic (needsAction). Build succeeds and detail view renders both PR lists correctly. Use TDD: test harness verifies row rendering.

title: Wire widget PR click to open detail window with selected tab
description: Add onTapGesture to PRRowView in ContentView. Capture selected PR and widget type. Pass selection to AppDelegate (use NotificationCenter or shared state). AppDelegate shows DetailWindow and switches to appropriate tab based on widget type. Window optionally scrolls to/highlights selected PR. Build succeeds and click interaction works end-to-end. Use TDD: test harness verifies click handling and window opening.

title: Implement 'Open in Claude' button action handler
description: Add action handler to 'Open in Claude' button in DetailRowView. Extract PR metadata (title, number, repo, URL). Prepare for Claude Code launch (next task will handle Terminal integration). Verify button is clickable and handler receives correct PR data. Build succeeds. Use TDD: test harness verifies button action and data extraction.

title: Generate Claude Code prompt based on PR type
description: Create prompt generator function that produces appropriate Claude Code context based on widget type. For My PRs with new comments: summarize PR, reviewer comments, what needs addressing. For PRs I'm tagged in: summarize PR, changes, risks, review opinion. Extract comment data from GitHub CLI when available. Prompt should be actionable and context-rich. Build succeeds. Use TDD: test harness verifies prompt generation for both PR types.

title: Launch Terminal and execute Claude Code with context
description: Implement Terminal.app launcher using NSWorkspace or AppleScript. Execute 'claude' command with generated prompt. Handle edge cases: Terminal not available, Claude Code not installed, command execution failures. Build succeeds and Terminal opens with Claude Code context. Use TDD: test harness verifies Terminal launch command generation.

title: Implement periodic polling mechanism using Timer
description: Create timer-based polling mechanism that refreshes PR data every 5 minutes. Use PRRefreshService.refreshAll() to fetch fresh data. Add timer to AppDelegate lifecycle. Handle timer cleanup on app termination. Build succeeds and timer fires periodically. Use TDD: test harness verifies timer setup and refresh calls.

title: Update widget UI when PR data changes
description: Wire PRDataStore updates to ContentView refresh. Use NotificationCenter or Combine to notify widgets when data changes. PRListViewModel reloads data and updates highlight states. Both widgets (My PRs and Review Requested) reflect new data automatically. Build succeeds and UI updates reactively. Use TDD: test harness verifies notification flow and UI refresh.

title: Handle polling edge cases and errors
description: Handle network failures gracefully (show last known data, log errors). Handle GitHub rate limits (exponential backoff, user notification). Handle stale data (show last update time in UI). Add error state to PRListViewModel. Build succeeds and edge cases are handled. Use TDD: test harness verifies error scenarios.

title: Fix window level to desktop background instead of floating
description: Change FloatingPanel window level from .floating to desktop background level. Currently line 23 in FloatingPanelController.swift uses .floating which makes widgets appear above all windows. Required: widgets should sit on desktop background like macOS time widgets. Implementation: Use NSWindow.Level(rawValue: Int(CGWindowLevelForKey(.desktopWindow))) or .normal - 1. Test that widgets remain movable and visible on desktop background. Build succeeds and widgets no longer float above other windows.

title: Debug and fix GitHub CLI error in PR data fetching
description: Widgets show error: 'Failed to refresh: The operation couldn't be completed. (PRDesk.GitHubClientError error 1.)' Investigation shows gh CLI works from terminal but fails from Swift app. Debug by: 1) Add better error logging in GitHubClient.swift to capture actual stderr output, 2) Check PATH/environment issues when running gh from app, 3) May need full path to gh binary or environment setup, 4) Verify gh auth status from app context. Acceptance: widgets successfully fetch and display PR data, error logging shows root cause, build succeeds.
